title: GasCityExecutionTerminal v1
description: Domain-addressed completion notification for a GasCityWorkRequested.v1 execution. FLAT detail (no cross-city envelope): the consumer is a deterministic domain runtime, not another city, so the event is published with the domain event source (GASCITY_DOMAIN_EVENT_SOURCE, default GasCity) and this object as the EventBridge detail. Domain bridges match on detail-type plus detail.target_env and may enforce a stricter process-specific schema on top of this generic shape; fields echoed from the originating work request (correlation, formula_bundle_hash, job_id) must be echoed verbatim. Published only by the domain-handoff handoff-terminal-sweep order via publish-cross-city-event.sh. Contract version 1.1.
